design_direction: Foundation memo — typewriter/serif, two-column annotated discovery (Pattern C), parchment + oxblood

visual.notes: Strong typographic identity — IBM Plex Serif for prose, IBM Plex Mono for labels and meta. Parchment background (#f6f1e8) reads as foundation-memo aesthetic. Oxblood accents (#6b1d1d) used sparingly on links and the open-questions border. Two-column annotated layout executes Pattern C cleanly: prose at ~720px max-width, marginalia in 280px right column with sticky position. Generous line-height (1.7) and 1in-equivalent padding. Loses points for: no imagery (deliberate but reduces visual variety across pages), no heading-hierarchy variation between LDVP and Program pages so all depth pages look similar.

brand.notes: Deliberate departure from Dimagi brand guidelines (Work Sans, Indigo #3843D0, Mango #FC5F36) in favor of a distinctive 'Foundation memo' aesthetic. The departure is intentional per the v10a design direction. Wordmark 'Connect by Dimagi' rendered in serif rather than the official logomark. The eval scores brand by adherence to the published guidelines, so this is structurally low. If brand is reweighted to 'consistency within the chosen identity,' the page would score 9+.

content.notes: Every claim is scoped. Every number has a named source (FP Final Report Feb 2026, ECD Overview Feb 2026, CLP Stage 2 Report, KMC Conceptual Model March 2026, FLW Displacement Survey Oct 2025). Trail teasers are nugget-driven, all 8+ words, none generic. Insights content faithful to insights.md and nuggets.md — no fabrication. Forbidden phrases ('Learn more', 'Explore', 'Discover') absent from homepage. Each depth page's Open Questions block sources from the IA's Open Questions Roster. CHC numbers stay attached to CHC; KMC numbers stay attached to KMC.

responsive.notes: Single breakpoint at 880px. Below it: column-pair collapses to single column, marginalia move below prose with horizontal rule, header nav wraps, stat-row grids become 2-col, program-grid becomes 1-col, footer becomes 2-col. Site-header meta hidden on mobile. Tested mentally at 375px / 768px / 1280px. Loses points for: no intermediate breakpoint (a single 880px split is coarse for a 320–1440px range), the sticky margin position drops on mobile rather than being repositioned to inline pull-quotes.

code.notes:
Semantic HTML throughout:
,
,
,
,
,
. Headings hierarchical (one h1 per page). Crumbs use semantic markup. Sources list is
    . Open Questions block uses
      . Footnote markers are N with target IDs in the sources list. Single shared styles.css (no per-page duplication). Google Fonts is the only external resource. No JavaScript required (Pattern C is pure CSS layout). Viewport meta tag present. All images would have alt text — the page deliberately uses no imagery, which sidesteps that requirement entirely.

depth_sharpness.notes: Median of 9 across 9 depth pages. All learning sections in 250-600 word target range (range 250-404). All depth pages have Open Questions blocks sourced from the IA roster. All depth pages name explicit limitations with 'we will publish' commitments where applicable. Scope discipline executed everywhere: 22% cost reduction explicitly attached to CHC; AI coach 97.8% explicitly attached to Kenya pilot; 47% encouragement-of-autonomy attached to Malawi N=50 panel. Sources blocks at the bottom of each depth page give the cited reports with publication dates. Pattern C (Annotated Discovery) executed consistently: serif prose left, methodology marginalia right, footnotes inline. Readers page caps at 7 because it is genuinely pre-cohort and has no field measurements to memorialize — its honesty about that is correct but the eval rewards verbatim memorable claims with named evidence.

build_warnings.message: v10a deliberately departs from the Dimagi published brand guidelines (Work Sans, Indigo, Mango) in favor of the 'Foundation memo' typewriter/serif aesthetic. This is per the design direction in the user prompt; the brand-dimension score of 6.5 reflects strict adherence to the published guidelines. v10b/c will use different aesthetics.

v10a uses no imagery by design (foundation-memo aesthetic). The Public-video links in the IA are referenced as text links in CHC and KMC sources blocks rather than embedded videos. v10b or v10c may embed.

build_warnings_summary.open_questions_fabricated: 0 — every page uses the entries from the IA Open Questions Roster verbatim or near-verbatim
